title: AIS shows FD interest ₹18,000 — no matching 26AS TDS entry (presence_mismatch)

conflict_log_entry.note: FD interest in AIS not covered by TDS entry in 26AS. TDS may not have been deducted (amount below ₹40,000 threshold) or was deducted but not yet reflected. Income must still be reported.

notes: FD interest below ₹40,000 threshold doesn't attract TDS u/s 194A, so 26AS having no entry is normal. AIS still records the income. This is not a conflict — it's an AIS-only income that must be included in the return. R-0007 flags it as presence_mismatch; V-002 fires if this income is not in the classified_income output.
